understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate the player to the '+' gem tile in each level, avoiding spikes, within a limited number of turns and with a limited number of attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is grid-based with MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN. Gravity is directional; when gravity is DOWN, horizontal moves can also cause the player to fall vertically if there is no supporting tile below. The CLICK action removes a clickable tile, potentially altering the path. Spike tiles are hazards that end the run if touched. Each level has 2 attempts and 50 turns per attempt. Undo functionality seems implied. The player must efficiently use clicks to clear a path to the goal while managing remaining steps.
